pillars.title: Carbon Disclosure
pillars.summary: Mandatory carbon accounting for node operations with quarterly public reporting thresholds aligned to open standards.

pillars.title: Resource Stewardship
pillars.summary: Efficiency targets for compute, storage, and network services with governance review on non-conformance.

pillars.title: Green Protocol Eligibility
pillars.summary: Energy and data-efficiency thresholds for protocol-backed service labelling across civic platforms.

pillars.title: Sustainable Procurement
pillars.summary: Low-carbon vendor preference and verifiable sustainability claims in infrastructure acquisition.

pillars.title: Citizen Environmental Fellowship
pillars.summary: Civic participation in auditing, awareness campaigns, and compliance tooling for green standards.

pillars.title: Biodiversity & Land Use
pillars.summary: Assessment and mitigation framework for infrastructure footprint on local ecosystems and protected areas.

policy.title: Carbon Disclosure Protocol
policy.summary: Mandates published carbon accounting for all node operations, with quarterly disclosure formats aligned to open standards.

policy.title: Resource Efficiency Directive
policy.summary: Sets efficiency targets for compute, storage, and network subsystems; non-conformance triggers governance review.

policy.title: Green Protocol Eligibility Framework
policy.summary: Services and integrations must meet energy and data-efficiency thresholds to carry the green protocol label.

policy.title: Sustainable Procurement Mandate
policy.summary: All infrastructure procurement requires vendor carbon disclosure and lifecycle assessment.

policy.title: E-Waste Circular Economy Policy
policy.summary: Mandates repair, refurbishment, and certified recycling for all decommissioned civic hardware.

policy.title: Water Usage Efficiency Standard
policy.summary: Cooling water recycling and efficiency targets for data centre operations in water-stressed regions.

policy.title: Renewable Energy Procurement Target
policy.summary: 80% renewable energy for all node operations by 2027 with annual milestone reporting.

policy.title: Biodiversity Impact Assessment
policy.summary: Required assessment for new infrastructure sites within 5km of protected areas or critical habitat.

policy.title: Green Software Development Guidelines
policy.summary: Code efficiency, build optimisation, and deployment density standards for all civic software.

programs.title: Green Procurement Program
programs.summary: Prefers low-carbon infrastructure providers and hardware vendors with verifiable sustainability claims.

programs.title: Citizen Sustainability Fellowship
programs.summary: Supports citizen contributions to environmental auditing, awareness, and compliance tooling.

programs.title: Zero-Waste Operations Sprint
programs.summary: Targets operational waste reduction across node maintenance, documentation, and civic program logistics.

programs.title: Node Carbon Optimisation
programs.summary: Continuous tuning of node energy profiles, workload scheduling, and thermal efficiency.

programs.title: Renewable Energy Credit Tracking
programs.summary: On-chain tracking of renewable energy certificates matched to node consumption.

programs.title: Community Reforestation Partnership
programs.summary: Citizen-led reforestation credits offsetting unavoidable infrastructure emissions.

programs.title: Hardware Lifecycle Extension
programs.summary: Refurbishment and redeployment programme extending server lifecycle by 3-5 years.

programs.title: Green Data Centre Certification
programs.summary: Third-party certification of civic data centres against PUE, WUE, and renewable energy criteria.

programs.title: Citizen Carbon Literacy Workshops
programs.summary: Monthly workshops on personal and civic carbon accounting, reduction strategies, and verification.

programs.title: Urban Heat Island Mitigation
programs.summary: Green roof and cool pavement deployment at civic facilities in dense urban zones.

standards.title: Green Protocol Eligibility
standards.summary: Services and integrations must meet energy and data-efficiency thresholds to carry the green protocol label.

standards.title: Carbon Disclosure Format
standards.summary: Standardised JSON and PDF disclosure templates for node carbon reporting.

standards.title: Sustainable Hardware Standard
standards.summary: Lifecycle and repairability criteria for civic hardware procurement.

standards.title: Renewable Energy Verification
standards.summary: On-chain attestation format for renewable energy certificate retirement and node matching.

standards.title: E-Waste Handling Protocol
standards.summary: Chain-of-custody documentation for decommissioned hardware through certified recyclers.

standards.title: Water Usage Effectiveness
standards.summary: Cooling water metrics and recycling ratio reporting for data centre operations.

standards.title: Biodiversity Offset Registry
standards.summary: Verifiable biodiversity credit standard for infrastructure impact mitigation.

reports.title: Q1 Carbon Disclosure Review
reports.summary: Review of node carbon disclosures, data quality, and open-standard conformance.

reports.title: Annual Efficiency Impact Report
reports.summary: Aggregates efficiency changes, waste reductions, and green protocol adoption across nodes.

reports.title: Sustainable Procurement Compliance Audit
reports.summary: Vendor assessment results, carbon disclosure completeness, and lifecycle claim verification.

reports.title: Renewable Energy Progress Report
reports.summary: Year-over-year renewable energy percentage across all node operations with regional breakdown.
